name: Garlic, Cheese, and Nut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the garlic cloves using a garlic press.
2. Beat the crushed garlic into the softened cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add the sour cream to the mixture and blend well.
4. Incorporate the onion, paprika, curry powder, chili powder, and dill into the mixture, blending thoroughly.
5. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese and chopped walnuts.
6. Serve at room temperature or chilled. This recipe makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip.
7. Suggested dippers: sesame crackers, celery, radishes, string beans.
